reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 비싼장난감에는 투자안하는편인데 할인하는김에 구냥 사봤는데 엄청 잘갖구놀아요~!!! 산도모양 넘 귀엽구 ><안에 간식넣어주니까 엄청 조아하구 그대신 침범벅이라ㅋㅋ 자주 세탁해줘야해요
reviews.content_en: I usually don't invest in expensive toys, but I grabbed this one while it was on sale and my pup LOVES it so much!!!🥰 The dinosaur shape is super cute ><. When I put treats inside, he goes crazy for it but it gets all slobbery lol. I have to wash it frequently

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 크기도 적당해서 애들이 잘 갖고 놀 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and the size is just right! I think the kids will enjoy playing with it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 장난감들 너무 좋아요.
왜냐구요? 당연히 울집 털복숭이가 잘 가지고 놀아서쥬~
환장합니다.
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love the BITE ME toys. Why? Because my fluffy furball at home loves playing with them of course~ I'm obsessed.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 마니닳아서 다시주문했어요 ㅋㅋㅋ최애장난감이라 오자마자 간식넣어줬더니 잘 갖고놀아요
reviews.content_en: It got worn out so I reordered it lol 😂 It's my pet's favorite toy so when it arrived, I stuffed it with treats right away and they play with it so well

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 진짜 귀여워요 데굴데굴 잘 굴러가서 냥이들이 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It rolls really smoothly so my cats love it

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요ꯁ.̮ꯁ 포장지도 귀엽네용
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable ꯁ.̮ꯁ Even the packaging is cute lol

reviews.name: 솜****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 포켓이 있는 장난감만 구매하는데 넘 귀엽고 저희집 애기가 아주 좋아하네요 만족입니다
reviews.content_en: I only buy toys with nosework pockets and this one is super cute! My baby loves it so much. Very satisfied

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
장난감이 좀 두꺼워서 소형견이 물기엔 좀 커요!
그래도 잘빼먹고, 디자인이 귀여워서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The toy is a bit thick so it's kind of large for a small dog to bite! But they still manage to get the treats out, and I love it because the design is adorable

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 강아지가 좋아해요 노즈워크 공간이 깊어서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it. The nosework pockets are nice and deep which is great

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가나디가 좋아해요 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: Gana really loves it lol

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 이것도 제가 귀여워서 샀어요. 간식 숨기는공간이 좀더 많으면 좋겠네요ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought this because it's so cute too. I wish there were more spaces to hide treats though ㅠ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 오분만에 죽었어요 ㅠㅠ 파괴왕
reviews.content_en: It died in 5 minutes ㅠㅠ Total destruction king

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 ㄱ여운 장난감 부들부들
reviews.content_en: Such a cute toy, super soft and cuddly

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 삑삑이에 바스락에 노즈워크까지 총집합 장난감 최고최고
reviews.content_en: Squeaker, crinkle, and nose work all in one toy - the best of the best

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 신상좋아해요 또사야겟슴다
reviews.content_en: Love the new product gotta buy it again

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 빠른배송감사합니다 신상 좋아요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the fast shipping, love the new product ㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 빠른배송 아주감사합니다람쥐
reviews.content_en: Thanks so much for the fast shipping! 🐿️

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 제 최애 디저트 ㅠㅠㅠ 후르츠산도 보자마자 이건 사야해!! 일단 이건 제꺼하려고요... 소 큐트..
reviews.content_en: My absolute favorite treat ㅠㅠㅠ As soon as I saw the fruit sand, I was like I have to get this!! Gonna keep this one for myself... so cute..

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 애기가 거부감 없이 즐겁게 가지고 놉니다
reviews.content_en: My baby enjoys playing with it without any hesitation
